raw_text:
HEADER
FIRSTLAST
Data Science Manager
New York City, NY 10000first. last@resumeworded. com+1 (212) 123-4567
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
San Francisco, C Aand New York, NY 2016-Present 2015-2016
RESUMEWORDED Data Science Manager Senior Data Scientist
2012-2015
Conducted data regression analysis of therelationship between company stock prices and current industry trends, leading to 15% higher accuracy prediction of performance than the last 4 years.
Led full redesign of websitewithfindings from customer segmentation and competitiveresearch, increasing websiteleadsby225%.
Developed a new targeting model by segmenting potential users by behavioral attributes from survey data, generating $1. 5M in sales.
Designed training and peer-mentoring programs for the incoming class of 25 analysts in 2014; reduced onboarding time for newhiresby50%.
Selected Project Experience
Fraud Detection Project
Drove redevelopment of fraud detection algorithm, introducing 10+ new attributes, resulting in decreased falsepositive casesby75%.
Analyzed customer's spendingbehavior, includingmapping thelocation of the spendersto identify fraudulent transactions from the non-fraudulent ones, increasing the accuracy rate by over 97%.
Led the team of 3 members to conduct market research in an efficient manner, completing the project 4 weeksearlierthanestimatedtimeline.
Operations Management Project
Streamlined standard business processes and internal systems resulting in work efficiency raise by 22%
Led consolidation of 6 data systems into 1, resulting in 55K in annual savings.
Refined outsourcing strategy, resulting in increased offshore headcount from 12 to 39 employees.
GROWTHSI
Data Scientist
Developed and maintained ETL scripts in Python and Perl to scrape data from external websites into a SQL database.
Collaborated with other teams as a Representative of the Data Analysis department and developed key metrics to achieve business outcomes, resulting in an increase in revenue by $450, 000 collectively.
Collaboratedwithfundamental longandshortportfoliomanagers and analyststoevaluatethepredictivepower ofuniquedatasourcesfor singlestockselection.
EDUCATION
GROWTHSI
San Francisco, CA 2011-2012
Masterof Sciencein Managementwith Honors
Awards:Bill & Melinda Gates Fellow (only 5 awarded to class),President's List 2017 (top10%).
ADDITIONALINFORMATION
Technical Skills:Microsoft Access, SQL, Project Management, Python, Perl, SQL/SQ Lite3.
Certifications:Microsoft Certified Solutions Expert (August 2016),Passed Resume Worded examinations.
RESUMEWORDEDUNIVERSITY
2007-2011
New York, NY
Bachelorof Engineering, Majorin Computer Science;Minorin Mathematics
Completed one-year study abroad with Singapore University.
Awards:Won nationwide data science competition out of 500+participants (2013).

## HEADER

FIRSTLAST
Data Science Manager
New York City, NY 10000first. last@resumeworded. com+1 (212) 123-4567

## PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

San Francisco, C Aand New York, NY 2016-Present 2015-2016
### RESUMEWORDED Data Science Manager Senior Data Scientist
**Date:** 2012-2015
- Conducted data regression analysis of therelationship between company stock prices and current industry trends, leading to 15% higher accuracy prediction of performance than the last 4 years.
- Led full redesign of websitewithfindings from customer segmentation and competitiveresearch, increasing websiteleadsby225%.
- Developed a new targeting model by segmenting potential users by behavioral attributes from survey data, generating $1. 5M in sales.
- Designed training and peer-mentoring programs for the incoming class of 25 analysts in 2014; reduced onboarding time for newhiresby50%.
- Selected Project Experience
- Fraud Detection Project
- Drove redevelopment of fraud detection algorithm, introducing 10+ new attributes, resulting in decreased falsepositive casesby75%.
- Analyzed customer's spendingbehavior, includingmapping thelocation of the spendersto identify fraudulent transactions from the non-fraudulent ones, increasing the accuracy rate by over 97%.
- Led the team of 3 members to conduct market research in an efficient manner, completing the project 4 weeksearlierthanestimatedtimeline.
- Operations Management Project
- Streamlined standard business processes and internal systems resulting in work efficiency raise by 22%
- Led consolidation of 6 data systems into 1, resulting in 55K in annual savings.
- Refined outsourcing strategy, resulting in increased offshore headcount from 12 to 39 employees.
- GROWTHSI
### Data Scientist
- Developed and maintained ETL scripts in Python and Perl to scrape data from external websites into a SQL database.
- Collaborated with other teams as a Representative of the Data Analysis department and developed key metrics to achieve business outcomes, resulting in an increase in revenue by $450, 000 collectively.
### Collaboratedwithfundamental longandshortportfoliomanagers and analyststoevaluatethepredictivepower ofuniquedatasourcesfor singlestockselection.

## EDUCATION

San Francisco, CA 2011-2012
Masterof Sciencein Managementwith Honors
Awards:Bill & Melinda Gates Fellow (only 5 awarded to class),President's List 2017 (top10%).
ADDITIONALINFORMATION
Technical Skills:Microsoft Access, SQL, Project Management, Python, Perl, SQL/SQ Lite3.
Certifications:Microsoft Certified Solutions Expert (August 2016),Passed Resume Worded examinations.
### RESUMEWORDEDUNIVERSITY
**Date:** 2007-2011
- New York, NY
- Bachelorof Engineering, Majorin Computer Science;Minorin Mathematics
### Completed one-year study abroad with Singapore University.
- Awards:Won nationwide data science competition out of 500+participants (2013).
